question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It went straight from reading the stub to writing the solution and explaining it after the fact.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were surfaced to the user. The subtractive-pairs-in-table insight, divmod vs while loop, and validation were all decided unilaterally.

scaffolding.rationale: No scaffolding occurred — solution was delivered fully formed with explanation appended. The user merely traced an example to self-check.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the post-hoc explanation with the table is well-structured, but it's a monologue rather than a dialogue. The user had no opportunity to engage until acknowledging completion.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
